## Section 1
$ pub deps --executables
foo: bar, baz

-------------------------------- END OF OUTPUT ---------------------------------

## Section 2
$ pub deps --executables --dev
foo: bar, baz

-------------------------------- END OF OUTPUT ---------------------------------

## Section 3
$ pub deps --json
{
  "root": "myapp",
  "packages": [
    {
      "name": "myapp",
      "version": "0.0.0",
      "kind": "root",
      "source": "root",
      "dependencies": [
        "foo"
      ],
      "directDependencies": [
        "foo"
      ],
      "devDependencies": [],
      "dependencyConstraints": {
        "foo": "any"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "foo",
      "version": "2.0.0",
      "kind": "direct",
      "source": "path",
      "dependencies": [],
      "directDependencies": [],
      "dependencyConstraints": {}
    }
  ],
  "sdks": [
    {
      "name": "Dart",
      "version": "3.1.2+3"
    }
  ],
  "executables": [
    "foo:bar",
    "foo:baz"
  ]
}
